Title: Requires SUNY and CUNY institutions which offer a master of social work degree program to offer a maternal mental health elective course to students
Summary: Requires SUNY and CUNY institutions which offer a master of social work degree program to offer a maternal mental health elective course to students to provide comprehensive training in perinatal mood and anxiety disorders and instruct students how to apply best practices in screening, referral and treatment.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to requiring SUNY and CUNY institutions which offer a master of social work degree program to offer a maternal mental health elective course to students
